title: totem or Carrot?
description:
CH:更改了不死图腾和金胡萝卜的贴图。
EN:Changed the textures of the Totem of Immortality and the Golden Carrot.
body:
EN:all version ok！
   Changed the textures of the Totem of the Immortals and the Golden Carrot to make them easier to confuse.

CH:所有版本支持!
   更改不死图腾和金胡萝卜的贴图，让它们更容易混淆。
